title: SQL: time zone does not have effect on now()
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE events (event_id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, user_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
SELECT u.name, e.event_time FROM users u JOIN events e ON u.id = e.user_id WHERE e.event_time > NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
key_bug_features: now() function ignores time zone settings
